goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type', 'address', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get whether they have internet
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type, address, and postcode
